Since we know Katarina has 6.8 times of ten cookies, we can just calculate everything from there.', '', '```python', 'from sympy import Rational', '', '# Katarina has 6.8 times of ten cookies', "katarina = Rational('6.8') * 10", '', '# Max has 5 more cookies than Katarina', 'max_cookies = katarina + 5', '', '# Cookie Monster: Max has 1.2 times of ten more cookies than Cookie Monster', '# So: max_cookies = 1.2 * (monster_cookies + 10)', '# Rearranging: monster_cookies = (max_cookies - 1.2 * 10) / 1.2', "monster_cookies = (max_cookies - Rational('1.2') * 10) / Rational('1.2')", '', '# Summer has 23 more cookies than Max', 'summer_cookies = max_cookies + 23', '', '# Calculate the total', 'total_cookies = katarina + max_cookies + monster_cookies + summer_cookies', '', 'print(f"Katarina has {katarina} cookies")', 'print(f"Max has {max_cookies} cookies")', 'print(f"Cookie Monster has {monster_cookies} cookies")', 'print(f"Summer has {summer_cookies} cookies")', 'print(f"Total number of cookies: {total_cookies}")', '```'], 'role': 'user', 'name': 'assistant'} {'content': ['Katarina has 68 cookies', 'Max has 73 cookies', 'Cookie Monster has 305/6 cookies', 'Summer has 96 cookies', 'Total number of cookies: 1727/6', '', 'Katarina has 68 cookies', 'Max has 73 cookies', 'Cookie Monster has 305/6 cookies', 'Summer has 96 cookies', 'Total number of cookies: 1727/6'], 'role': 'assistant', 'name': 'mathproxyagent'} {'content': ['The results seem consistent across both calculations.
